strategy: Low Volatility / BAB v2 (CRSP Beta Decile 1)

params.data: CRSP NYSE/NYSEMKT Beta Decile 1 (lowest beta stocks)
params.signal: always long beta decile 1; buy-and-hold low-beta portfolio
params.note: CRSP NYSE/NYSEMKT Beta Decile 1 from 10_crsp_market_portfolios.parquet (indno=1000102). True BAB signal: long 20% lowest-beta stocks on NYSE/NYSEMKT. Monthly rebalance built into the CRSP portfolio construction. Better Market Betas zip covers 1986-2019 (individual stock betas); CRSP beta deciles cover 1925-2025 and are the standard academic benchmark. Period: 1970-2025.
